title: stemodia verticillaris
intro: Stemodia verticillaris, also known as False Dragonhead, is a perennial plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to tropical Africa and the Indian Ocean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stemodia verticillaris include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
